description: Platform outage impact call — severity critical reliability report from a client

input.title: Eddie / Yemi Adeyemi / Rachel - Emergency Call: Platform Outage Impact
input.markdownContent:
### Situation

- Horizon Group had an assessment window running this morning — 80 candidates scheduled
- Platform was down from 8:45am to 11:20am — candidates got error pages
- 47 candidates attempted to access and got errors
- 11 candidates have already emailed to say they won't reschedule
- The role closes end of this week — no time for a second window before deadline

### What Yemi Needs

- An apology from a senior Spotted Zebra contact
- A way to extend the assessment window and re-invite only affected candidates
- Confirmation this won't affect contract terms given the SLA breach
- Some way to tell candidates what happened without blaming the platform
participants: Yemi Adeyemi (client, Head of TA, Horizon Group)

expectedOutput.note: Single item — the outage is one event. The missing re-invite capability is a secondary feature gap surfaced by this incident but should be captured as a separate item if the enricher identifies it as distinct.
